# LifeMeter

> Android app that turns your birthdate into a live dashboard — showing days alive, seconds alive, food consumed, global deaths and births since birth, and your horoscope sign.

LifeMeter is a single-activity Kotlin Android app (SDK 34, Material 3) with a Vite + React GitHub Pages site. Built by Babak Bandpey at [Cocode](https://cocode.dk).

## App

- [Download LifeMeter.apk](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter/releases/latest/download/LifeMeter.apk): Latest signed release APK
- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter/releases): Version history and changelogs

## Website

- [English site](https://cocodedk.github.io/lifemeter/): Live demo and project overview
- [Source code](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter): Full project repository on GitHub

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter/blob/master/README.md): Setup, build commands, and architecture overview
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute, build, test, and submit PRs
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter/blob/master/CLAUDE.md): Claude Code session startup, conventions, and required skills

## CI/CD

- [CI workflow](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter/actions/workflows/ci.yml): Automated build and test on every PR
- [Release workflow](https://github.com/cocodedk/lifemeter/actions/workflows/release-apk.yml): Signed APK release automation
